identity.mission: Create a premium, high-trust B2B organic fertilizer brand that blends industrial reliability with natural vitality.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Corporate Reliability (structure) with Organic Warmth (texture/color).
Content is King: Every section must build trust for a B2B distributor partnership.
Zoom In: specific details of granules/leaves to show quality.
Negative Space: Luxury = Space. Don't crowd the data.
anti_patterns: No 'Generic Farm' Clichés (clipart tractors, cartoon plants).
No 'Boring Grids' (use Bento or asymmetric layouts).
No 'Center-Everything' (use strong left alignment for corporate feel).

brand_strategy.target_audience: B2B Distributors, Fertilizer Brands, Large Scale Agriculture.
brand_strategy.key_goals: Phone Calls, Distributor Inquiries, Product Catalog Downloads.

primary.name: Deep Forest
primary.usage: Headers, Primary Buttons, Strong Branding Elements
primary.description: Represents established growth, trust, and nature.

secondary.name: Industrial Earth
secondary.description: A grounded, mineral-rich earth tone. Not too soft.

rules: Use the 'Deep Forest' green sparingly for impact, not as a background for text unless needed for a specific dark section.
Ensure all text on colored backgrounds meets WCAG AA contrast.

font_family.accents: Playfair Display, serif (Use sparingly for testimonials or 'Our Story' quotes)

rules: Headings must be 'Outfit'. It creates a modern, geometric, industrial feel.
Body text must be 'Manrope' for excellent legibility at small sizes.
Use tight tracking (-0.02em) on large headings.
Use relaxed leading (1.6) on body text.
Use generous whitespace. B2B luxury comes from breathing room.
Double the standard padding for cards (p-8 instead of p-4).

buttons.primary: bg-[#1B4D3E] text-white hover:bg-[#143d30] hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 font-medium px-8 py-3 rounded-full
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1B4D3E] border border-[#1B4D3E] hover:bg-[#1B4D3E] hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-3 rounded-full
buttons.accent: bg-[#D97706] text-white hover:bg-[#b45309] hover:shadow-lg px-8 py-3 rounded-full font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-sm

cards.feature: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all border border-gray-100 group
cards.product: bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-500 border border-gray-100

inputs.default: bg-[#F9F9F7] border-gray-200 focus:border-[#1B4D3E] focus:ring-[#1B4D3E] rounded-lg h-12 px-4

navigation.header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-gray-100 sticky top-0 z-50

layout_strategies.bento_grid: Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6 for feature showcases. Span items (col-span-2) to create visual interest.
layout_strategies.asymmetry: Avoid perfect centering. Use split layouts (Text Left / Image Right) with offset vertical alignment.
layout_strategies.overlap: Allow images to overlap sections or cards to overlap images to create depth (z-index layering).

hero.alt: Modern sustainable agriculture, lush green fields
hero.usage: Full width hero background or large split-screen image

product_closeups.alt: Close up of organic fertilizer granules

content_strategy.headlines: Strong, benefit-driven. Example: 'Powering India's Harvest with Organic Science.'
content_strategy.ctas: Clear action. 'Become a Distributor', 'Download Product Catalog', 'Get a Quote'.
content_strategy.trust_signals: Highlight ISO certifications, '10+ Years Experience', 'Trusted by 500+ Farmers' prominently.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit'.
Do NOT use generic gradients. Use solid, deep colors.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Use framer-motion for subtle entrance animations (fade-up).
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the design using the specified colors and fonts. Override the default Tailwind config with the 'Deep Forest' palette. Build a custom 'Sticky Header' and a 'Mega Footer'. Use the 'Bento Grid' for the Services section. Ensure the 'Contact Us' form is prominent and high-contrast.
